name: Beijing Andawell Science & Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Andawell Science & Technology Co., Ltd. operates in the aviation industry in the People's Republic of China. It manufactures airborne equipment, such as pilot and passenger seats, aircraft interiors, galley and lavatory systems, and related products for helicopters and aircrafts for military and civil customers; airborne electronic equipment, including radio altimeters and automatic direction finders, multimode integrated navigation devices, aero inner communication systems, and integrated standby flight displays; and PMA products comprises of cabin and passenger reading lights, LED lights, LCD displays, and passenger control units, as well as ovens and water heaters. The company also provides airborne electronic and mechanical equipment maintenance services; testing solutions consisting of on-site testing and automatic test equipment, and vibration health monitoring systems; and aircrafts retrofits services. Beijing Andawell Science & Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.
